rulings.Case Title: KEITH FREEDMAN VS. JACQUELINE ANN EUBANKS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Eubanks Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 27, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE EUBANKS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition. GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to appear and/or sit for Court-ordered deposition twice. While Plaintiff's counsel informed the Defendant about his medical condition on June 13, 2017, Plaintiff failed to propose any alternative dates for the deposition as of the date of the opposition to this motion. Trial is set for July 10, 2017. Plaintiff to appear and sit for deposition on July 5, 2017 or any other mutually agreed upon date between June 28, 2017 and July 5, 2017. Parties to each submit a declaration regarding compliance with this Order no later than 9:00 a.m. on July 6, 2017. If Plaintiff fails to appear for deposition or fails to sit for deposition, the Court will consider terminating sanctions at a continued hearing on July 7, 2017 at 9:30 a.m. Monetary sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110 to be paid no later than July 5, 2017. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEITH FREEDMAN VS. JACQUELINE ANN EUBANKS ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 27, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF KEITH FREEDMAN'S Motion For Protective Order And Request For Monetary Sanctions. DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ANTHONY BREAUX ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 27, 2017, line 8. DEFENDANT ANTHONY BREAUX'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states sufficient facts to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on landlord's use of the Ellis Act to go out of the residential rental business, which he is currently in as to the tenants using the property for residential purposes. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALBARO MARTINEZ VS. ANA MARIA TELEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Plaintiffs And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 27, 2017, line 12. DEFENDANT ANA TELLEZ'S Motion To Compel Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Plaintiffs And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff. GRANTED, subject to opposition and Proof of Service of the motion. Plaintiff to provide complete verified responses without objections to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Request for Production. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $400 upon presentation of (1) invoice and (2) receipt for payment of $400 to EDC for motion to compel. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. ABDULLAH MUHAMHAD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 27, 2017, line 9. DEFENDANT MAHMOUD ALBAKOUSH'S Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment. GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant presenting proof of hospitalization at the hearing; (2) Defendant posting $5,850 no later than June 27, 2017 by 4:00 p.m.; and (3) Defendant filing an answer no later than June 27, 2017 by 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: BOSTON PRIVATE BANK & TRUST CO, TRUSTEE VS. KARA PANNU
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 27, 2017, line 10. DEFENDANT KARA PANNU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Unlawful detainer based on nuisance is sufficiently alleged based on California and local laws. There is no indication on the face of the complaint that this tenancy is HUD subsidized and subject to CFR. =(501/REQ)
